chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH BENCH AT SUKKUR Cr. Transfer Application No.S-46 of 2025 Date of hearing Order with signature of Judge Hearing of case 1. For orders on M.A NO.3091/2025 (U/A) 2. For orders on office objection 3. For orders on M.A No.3092/2025 (Ex/A) 4. For hearing of main case 17.06.2025 Mr. Mansoor Hussain Maitlo, Advocate for applicant.-.-.-.-.-.-.-.-.-.- The applicant/complainant has filed the instant Transfer Application, seeking transfer of Criminal Bail Application No. 32/2025, titled "Re: Sher Bahadur and another vs. The State," pending before the Court of the learned 2nd Civil Judge and Judicial Magistrate, Sukkur, to any other competent Court. At the very outset of the arguments, learned counsel for the applicant submitted that Criminal Bail Application No. 32/2025, in respect of which the instant Transfer Application has been filed, has already been decided/allowed by the learned trial Court today, i.e., 17.06.2025. The said assertion has been verified from the case diary dated 17.06.2025, of the trial Court. In view thereof, the instant Transfer Application has become infructuous and is accordingly disposed of, along with the listed applications. JUDGE Naveed Ali
